post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 189 (Newbie Game 77)
Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, including role PMs.
    • 1.5: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.6: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.7: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.8: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.9: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.10: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.11: Confirm by posting Confirm
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and Vote: fDAs is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, Vote:fdas, Vote: fads, Vote: fdsa, and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
    • 2.10: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.11: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 504 hours (3 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
    • 3.4: The night deadline will be 72 hours after night begins.
    • 3.5: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.6: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • 3.7: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.8: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.11: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
    • 3.12: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she may be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I (fdas) am the moderator of Mafia Game 189
    • 5.2: Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • 5.3: Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • 5.4: Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.5: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount
    • 5.6: If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Setup
This game will use the Matrix6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Three of the roles will be generated randomly by picking a row or column from the matrix. Then one Mafia Goon and 5 Vanilla Townies are added to maintain a 2:7 mafia:town ratio. The six possible setups are:
1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Mafia Roleblocker, 1 Mafia Goon
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons


Role PMs
Quote:
You are a Vanilla Townie. You have no other power other than your vote.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Cop. Every night, you may target one person and determine their alignment.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Doctor. Every night you may heal someone, allowing them to survive if they would have otherwise died. You may not heal yourself two nights in a row.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Tracker. Every night you may target someone and learn who they visited.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Jailkeeper. Each night you may choose someone to put in jail. That person will be unable to perform any actions that night and night kills attempting to target that person will be blocked.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a 1-Shot Bulletproof Townie. On the first time that you are attacked by the Mafia, that kill will be negated.

You win when all members of the Mafia are dead.
Quote:
You are a Mafia Goon. During the night you may talk with your partner () here to discuss who you want to kill.

You win when all members of the Town are dead.
Quote:
You are a Mafia Roleblocker. During the night you may talk with your partner () here to discuss who you want to kill. You may also target someone and that person will be unable to perform any actions that night. Your ability takes precedence over the jailkeeper.

You win when all members of the Town are dead.

Night 1: Michael34 dies

Do not post until this line is crossed out

The small town of AoPS-189 was founded by a group of people wanting to start a new life. Initially, things seemed to be going well. The town was successful and the people began settling into their new life. However, the peaceful life of the town was soon broken. The mayor of the town, fdas, was killed by a group of unidentified armed men. In order to find out the culprits behind this attack, the prominent members of the town came together to resulve this crisis.

Day 1 begins. Current time: 22:00:00 EDT 16 September 2019.

also while i have service + time
a quick note to get y'all started
there are a gazillion ways to scumhunt and everyone disagrees all the time
but my preferred basic method
is looking at motivations behind posts
like, as you read through posts, try to think about the possible town or mafia motivations behind posting that or voting like that or whatever else that whomever it was did
you wont always be right but its a good way to get started
and as you play in games you'll start to figure out what the "scumtells" are
but some basic ones are lurking (never posting), noncontrib (posting but not helping), bandwagoning (i agree i agree i agree), as well as most faulty logic
of course there are exceptions but pointing out this kind of stuff can start a conversation or discussion that can lead somewhere

post_rendered:
heyyyy welcome
here's your welcome checklist:

* have you read the rules and confirmed by following the confirm rule?
* preferred nicknames and pronouns he/she/it/they?
* have you read any other mafia games on aops?

also try to read through the game to get up to date on what happened
and when you're done, if you have any thoughts or questions, just say/ask plz! in fact try to post a lot about your thoughts on the game, other players, wagons, interactions, stuff like that and also reads cuz that's always good

important highlighted stuff that you should know but friendly reminders anyway:
* never ever edit or delete posts. use EBWOP (edit by way of post) or EBWON (edit by way of ninja aka sniped) instead
* it is a good idea to not claim - whatever your role or alignment - unless it's an emergency or you can see a way for town to win by you claiming
* keep an eye on the number of votes on someone and try not to hang them too far before the deadline
* speaking of which this game is MAJORITY HANG so unless we hang people no one will automatically die at the end of the day

i think that's the short version
hf and gl and tell us when you finish reading thanks!

When the sun rose, everyone gathered together, but they discovered that one of them was missing, Kazakata. They decided to visit his house to see what he was doing. The doorbell was rung, but no one answered. Finally, they decided to break in so they could make Kazakata attend the meeting. Strangely, Kazakata did not respond even after the door was broken down. The group went upstairs and opened the door to Kazakata's room. They saw Kazakata lying in a pool of blood and the room was in a state of disarray. One man went to examine the body. It seemed that Kazakata died from being stabbed in the back 30 times. Next to the body, there was a note with the following message scrawled messily: "Goodbye cruel world. Life is not worth living anymore. Better to die than to live without hope. -Kazakata"

"Worst case of suicide I have ever seen," one man said.

Kazakata died Night 2. He was a Vanilla Townie

mymathkid was sitting inside of his office inside the town jail. Through the window, he spotted some movement. He rose, stepping outside to investigate the disturbance. The area was silent, save for the rustling of the leaves under the cold night breeze. Then, mymathkid heard a branch break with an audible snap. He turned and spotted a hazy silhouette moving among the trees. mymathkid quickly gave chase. He ran through the forest, stepping over leaves and branches. The dark night made it difficult to see. Suddenly, his foot stepped on some leaves, which suddenly gave way. mymathkid fell into the pit trap breaking his leg on the hard rocks at the bottom. At the bottom of the pit he waited, yelling out into the night. No one answered. Then, a howl rang through the night. Several coyotes jumped down and attacked the wounded man. When the sun rose, the people found the dead body of mymathkid, dressed in the jailkeeper uniform. mymathkid was killed. He was a Jailkeeper

Day 4 begins. Current time: 17:00:00 EST 22 November 2019.

Suddenly, his foot stepped on some leaves, which suddenly gave way. mymathkid fell into the pit trap breaking his leg on the hard rocks at the bottom. At the bottom of the pit he waited, yelling out into the night. No one answered. Then, a howl rang through the night. Several coyotes jumped down and attacked the wounded man. When the sun rose, the people found the dead body of mymathkid, dressed in the jailkeeper uniform. mymathkid was killed. He was a [/color][color=#0f0]Jailkeeper[/color]

End of Day Votecount:
e_is_cool (2 HANGED): mathjay, cj13609517288

After the night ended and the jailkeeper was found dead, the survivors on the committee fell into a deep contemplation so that they can come to a mature and responsible conclusion. Someone realized that since the jailkeeper said he would jail e_is_cool, he could not have been the one to kill the jailkeeper. Thus, either cj13609517288 or mathjay must be the mafia. But then mathjay suddenly stood up and claimed that he was the 1-Shot Bulletproof, and thus there must be a roleblocker and so e_is_cool could have killed mymathkid.

Then, cj13609517288 asked mathjay, "Why didn't you tell us this earlier. This could have helped so much!"
mathjay replied, "I was afraid..."
"Afraid of what?", cj13609517288 asked.
"I was afraid the mafia wouldn't shoot me if they knew who I was," mathjay said.
"But mafia wouldn't have done that anyways," cj13609517288 said. "They would still have killed mymathkid."
"Oh, I didn't think of that," mathjay said. "Whoops."
"Hmm, I believe you," cj13609517288 said. "I think e_is_cool is the mafia."

Then, e_is_cool and mathjay started yelling at each other with cj13609517288 standing off to the side. Finally, the two sat down again. e_is_cool didn't really say much to cj13609517288, and believed that his clear virtue. Clearly, spending his time shouting at mathjay was the best way to prove his innocence. Then, cj13609517288 came to his decision. e_is_cool would be hanged. He was a Vanilla Townie.


Congratulations to the Mafia Team: mathjay (Mafia Goon), sneakerman51 (Mafia Goon) for wining the game.
